hero.heading: Eat, Drink & Enjoy the View
hero.subheading: Casual dining in the heart of Griffith Park — burgers, sandwiches, cold drinks, and one of the best patios in LA. 80 five-star reviews.

about.heading: Your Griffith Park Hangout
paragraphs: Griffith Park Clubhouse is the perfect pit stop before or after a hike, a round of golf, or a day exploring the park. We serve classic American fare — burgers, hot dogs, sandwiches, and cold beverages — in a relaxed, outdoor-friendly setting.
With 80 reviews and a 4.4-star rating, locals and visitors alike love our casual vibe, friendly staff, and unbeatable location inside one of LA's most iconic parks.
Open 7 AM to 5 PM, seven days a week. Come for the food, stay for the view.

services.title: Burgers & Dogs
services.description: Juicy burgers, loaded hot dogs, and classic American grill favorites cooked fresh to order.

services.title: Sandwiches & Wraps
services.description: Club sandwiches, chicken wraps, BLTs, and grab-and-go options for hikers and golfers.

services.title: Cold Drinks & Beer
services.description: Ice cold sodas, lemonade, iced tea, and a selection of craft and domestic beers on tap.

services.title: Breakfast & Brunch
services.description: Early morning breakfast plates, egg sandwiches, and coffee to fuel your park adventure.

reviews.name: Jessica T.
reviews.text: Perfect spot after a hike. Great burgers, cold beer, and the patio has an amazing view of the park.

reviews.name: Mark W.
reviews.text: Love this place. Casual, affordable, and the staff is always super friendly. A hidden gem in Griffith Park.

reviews.name: Laura K.
reviews.text: We come here after every round of golf. The food is solid, the prices are fair, and the vibe is unbeatable.

reviews.name: David R.
reviews.text: The Clubhouse is an LA institution. Nothing fancy, just good food in a beautiful setting.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Great breakfast stop before hitting the trails. The egg sandwich and coffee are perfect hiking fuel.

contact.address: 5500 Griffith Park Dr, Los Angeles, CA 90027
contact.mapEmbedQuery: Griffith Park Clubhouse 5500 Griffith Park Dr Los Angeles CA 90027

seo.title: Griffith Park Clubhouse | Casual Dining & Drinks in Griffith Park LA
seo.description: Burgers, sandwiches, and cold drinks inside Griffith Park. 80 reviews, 4.4 stars. Open 7 AM to 5 PM daily.
